title: ixora coccinea f. lutea
intro: Ixora coccinea f. lutea is a variety of the ixora coccinea plant, commonly known as the 'scarlet flame of the forest', a flowering shrub native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is also known to have anthelmintic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ixora coccinea f. lutea include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
